nasb.text: However, You are just in all that has come upon us; For You have dealt faithfully, but we have acted wickedly.

esv.text: Yet you have been righteous in all that has come upon us, for you have dealt faithfully and we have acted wickedly.

cnv.text: 在一切臨到我們身上的事上，你都是公義的； 因為你所行的是信實的，我們所行的是邪惡的。

ccb.text: 在这临到我们的一切事上，你都是公义的，因为你行事信实，我们行事邪恶。
